tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mild hypoglycemia, slightly elevated chloride and LDL cholesterol, and low HDL cholesterol. Other parameters, including renal function and HbA1c, are within normal limits. Lipid profile suggests increased cardiovascular risk. Recommend monitoring glucose levels, optimizing lipid management, and considering cardiovascular risk reduction strategies. No evidence of renal impairment or significant proteinuria.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
